generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values security and order, you know how important it is to stay vigilant. Recent events show that expanding domestic security powers isn't about restricting freedoms - it's about protecting them. Just look at how quickly authorities responded to the last major incident. With the right tools, they could've prevented so much harm. Our allies are strengthening their own capabilities - shouldn't we do the same? The alternative is leaving ourselves vulnerable. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurFuture
